scripts.deploy: npm run build && cd /tmp && rm -rf gh-deploy && mkdir gh-deploy && cd gh-deploy && git init && git remote add origin https://github.com/Chemafmp/vodafone-cm.git && cp -r /Users/josemafernandez/vodafone-cm/dist/. . && touch .nojekyll && git add -A && git commit -m 'Deploy to GitHub Pages' && git push origin HEAD:gh-pages --force
